data.title: Potassium Fluoride Market to reach $0.52 billion by 2032; report covers various forms, purities, and applications.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on October 16, 2025, a report regarding the Potassium Fluoride Market was released. The report covers various aspects including different forms of potassium fluoride such as solid and liquid, purity levels ranging from 95-99% and over 99%, and multiple applications like fluorination & analytical reagent, glass etching, flux, metal surface treatment, catalyst, electrolyte additive, and agrochemical.

data.title: BMO to sell 138 branches, open 150 new branches over 5 years to support growth in core markets.
data.description: BMO is set to sell 138 branches in specific markets as part of strategic efforts to reallocate capital and resources. In contrast, they aim to open 150 new branches within the next five years in key markets to facilitate sustained client and business expansion. This decision was made known in Toronto and Chicago on October 16, 2025. The company's ticker symbols on the Toronto and New York stock exchanges are BMO.

data.title: TARS Robotics launches WIYH dataset for embodied intelligence training, accessible in Dec 2025. #AI #TARS #WIYH.
data.description: On October 16, 2025, TARS Robotics, a company supported by Lanchi Ventures, introduced World In Your Hands (WIYH), marking the commencement of the world's premier extensive real-world project. TARS Robotics focuses on AI-driven embodied intelligence and offers cutting-edge robotic hardware, data, and model innovations.

data.title: Insteel Industries Inc. reports Q4 2025 results: $14.6 million net earnings, $177.4 million net sales, $28.6 million gross profit.
data.description: In Mount Airy, N.C., Insteel Industries Inc. (NYSE: IIIN), the leading manufacturer of steel wire reinforcing products for U.S. concrete construction, revealed financial outcomes for Q4 and fiscal year ending on September 27, 2025. Q4 2025 Highlights: Net earnings amounted to $14.6 million, translating to $0.74 per diluted share, while net sales reached $177.4 million. The company recorded a gross profit of $28.6 million, representing 16.1% of net sales.

data.title: Levo.ai unveils AI Security Platform in San Francisco, safeguarding AI from development to runtime.
data.description: Levo.ai has introduced a new Unified AI Security Platform in San Francisco. The platform aims to enhance the security measures for artificial intelligence, covering processes from Shift-Left to Runtime. This launch signifies a crucial step in ensuring the protection of AI technologies.

data.title: First Citizens Bank acquires 138 branches in 11 states from BMO Bank N.A., accelerating national expansion.
data.description: First Citizens Bank & Trust Company, a subsidiary of BancShares, is ramping up its growth with the opening of 138 new branches in 11 states. This move is part of their strategy to expand into new markets throughout the U.S. The expansion was announced on October 16, 2025, and shows a significant investment in the company's future. This substantial increase in branches signifies a strong commitment to serving a broader customer base and enhancing their presence nationwide.

data.title: KeyCorp 3Q 2025 net income $454M ($0.41/share), revenue $1.9B, 17% growth, net interest margin at 2.75%.
data.description: Total revenue showed a significant increase of 17% year-over-year, reaching $1.9 billion after adjusting for the impact of a securities portfolio repositioning from the previous year. The company achieved positive operating leverage on both total and adjusted fee bases compared to the same period last year. Furthermore, there was a 4% quarterly increase in net interest income. The net interest margin was reported at 2.75% during this period.

data.title: Thesis Gold appoints Stephen Crozier as EVP, External Affairs & Sustainability on Oct 14, 2025.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 16, 2025, Thesis Gold Inc. revealed the appointment of Mr. Stephen Crozier as the Executive Vice President for External Affairs and Sustainability. This decision was undertaken by the Company, traded on TSXV as TAU, WKN as A3EP87, and OTCQX as THSGF, and came into effect on October 14, 2025.

data.title: Aveanna (NASDAQ: AVAH) will release Q3 results on Nov 6, 2025, followed by conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET.
data.description: A healthcare company, Aveanna Healthcare Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: AVAH), disclosed that it will unveil its third-quarter financial results on Thursday, November 6, 2025, before the market opens. This announcement was made in Atlanta on October 16, 2025. Subsequently, a conference call to discuss the results is scheduled for 10:00 a.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day.

data.title: Rokmaster finds 14.6% Zn+Pb in channel sample on Duncan Lake Project, receives permits for drilling on Duncan Lake and Big Copper Projects.
data.description: Rokmaster Resources Corp. provided an update on the Duncan Lake and Big Copper Projects in Vancouver, BC on Oct. 16, 2025. The company's stock symbols are TSXV: RKR, OTCQB: RKMSF, and FSE: 1RR1. Rokmaster reported positive developments at both projects, which are situated in the same area.

data.title: Beazer Homes USA, Inc. will webcast Q4 & full year fiscal 2025 results on November 13, 2025 at 5:00 PM ET. Public can join at www.beazer.com.
data.description: Beazer Homes (NYSE: BZH) will announce its financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2025 on November 13, 2025 after the market closes. A conference call will be held at 5:00 PM ET on the same day for discussing the results. Interested individuals can access the call and view the Company's presentation on its website, www.beazer.com.

data.title: BNY Mellon Corp. reports Q3 2025 results; NYSE: BK; details at PRNewswire on Oct. 16.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (NYSE: BK), a leading global financial services firm, released its financial report. The company shared its earnings and provided a comprehensive update through a presentation. This announcement was made on October 16, 2025 from New York.
Bank Of New York Mellon Q3 2025 Earnings - Adj EPS $1.91 (est $1.77) - Rev $5.08B (est $4.97B) - Net Interest Income $1.24B (est $1.18B) - AUM $2.14T (est $2.14T)

data.title: Glasshouse Fragrances partners with Anthropologie, launching in 130 US stores with Holiday Express Collection.
data.description: Glasshouse Fragrances, a top fine fragrance and home scent brand hailing from Australia, is extending its presence in the United States through a significant new venture. In a forthcoming partnership with Anthropologie stores throughout the country, the brand is set to introduce its renowned fragrances to a wider consumer base. The collaboration begins with the release of Glasshouse Fragrances' much-awaited Holiday Express Collection, debuting at 130 Anthropologie locations across the US in the upcoming fall season.

data.title: BNY Mellon declares dividends on common and preferred stock. Includes quarterly common stock dividend on Oct. 16, 2025. BK (NYSE)
data.description: On October 16, 2025, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation, a prominent global financial services firm traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BK, revealed its latest financial moves. The company's Board of Directors approved dividends for both common and preferred stock. For common stockholders, a quarterly dividend was announced.
